overall.description: A first-person exploration of a snowy coastal environment in a video game. The player walks along a frozen shoreline, enters the water, swims past a beached motorboat, and emerges onto an ice field. The scene features snow-covered mountains, clear skies, and realistic water rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy coastal shoreline with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered shoreline beside the calm ocean

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain slope with scattered evergreen trees
snow-covered beach with ice formations along the waterline
calm dark ocean water meeting the frozen shore
dark rocks protruding from the snow along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a serene winter coastline with a snow-covered beach stretching alongside calm ocean waters. A steep mountain slope rises on the left, blanketed in snow and dotted with trees. The camera moves forward along the frozen shoreline under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with ice edge

events.description: camera enters the water from the snowy shore, transitioning from walking to swimming
beached motorboat comes into view in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: swimming through shallow coastal waters along the ice edge, approaching a distant object

entered.detail: small white motorboat stranded on the ice edge with rope coiled on the deck

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the water and swims forward through the calm coastal waters. The snowy mountain recedes into the distance on the left while the ice edge remains visible on the right. Around 35 seconds, a beached motorboat appears ahead, becoming the focal point as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen ice field with scattered rocks

events.description: camera emerges from water onto snow-covered ice, hands become visible at bottom of frame

agents.ego_description: emerging from the water onto the ice field, passing the beached boat, and walking toward snow-covered rocks

entered.detail: vast expanse of snow-covered ice with subtle blue tint
dark boulders partially buried in snow on the ice field

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the water onto a vast snow-covered ice field, with the character's hands briefly visible. The beached boat is passed on the right and left behind as the camera moves toward scattered dark rocks protruding from the snow. The ocean remains visible in the distance to the left while the snowy mountain looms far behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene winter coastline into the ocean and finally onto a vast, frozen ice field. It begins by gliding along a snow-covered beach beneath a clear blue sky, with a steep, tree-dotted mountain slope rising to the left. As the camera leaves the shoreline and enters the calm coastal waters, the mountain recedes into the distance while a beached motorboat emerges ahead as the new focal point. The scene then shifts as the camera emerges from the water onto the ice, passing the boat to the side while the character's hands briefly enter the frame. Finally, the movement continues across the expansive white terrain toward scattered dark rocks, leaving the ocean and the distant mountain behind.
